question: Can TRXUSDT monthly 180-day positive time-series momentum at 0.5x remain positive after conservative turnover costs and a 4% annual capital hurdle while reducing drawdown versus passive 0.5x exposure across sequential untouched periods?
development_gate: stress after 4% annual hurdle >0; max drawdown >-25% and better than passive; 90d/270d >0; turnover <=8; data PASS
evaluation_gate: stress after hurdle >0; both years positive; max drawdown >-18% and better than passive; 90d/270d >0; data PASS
confirmation_gate: stress after hurdle >0; both year slices positive; max drawdown >-15% and better than passive; 90d/270d >=0; evaluation+confirmation compounded >0; data PASS
holdout_release_rule: development only after checkpoint; evaluation only after development pass; confirmation only after evaluation pass
